title: Interview with Kobun Shizuno about Evangelion 10
display_title: Interview with Kobun Shizuno about Evangelion 10
wikitext:
[]: Interview with Kobun Shizuno about Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 02, 2010 4:39 pm Read here. It's been out for years now and I only just discovered it thanks to ReVa. Maybe I should reconsider which forum to call home if you guys don't keep up with this stuff! Of particular interest to me is that the dialogue for NME is recorded before the animation is animated. It'd be great if this caught on, as lip flap is generally anime's weakest point.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:19 pm SSD can't be blamed for "not keeping up" with something she wasn't aware of! Anyway, interesting stuff. I agree that it makes more sense to record the lines first then match the expressions accordingly instead of the reverse with standard anime practice. I'm also kind of glad to know that all Anno had to do was give the cast a call and they were fine with coming back, heh.

[]: Re: Interview with Kobun Shizuno about Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:30 pm NAveryW wrote: It's been out for years now and I only just discovered it thanks to ReVa. Maybe I should reconsider which forum to call home if you guys don't keep up with this stuff!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:41 pm OK, fine. I'll stay as long as image macros like that one remain acceptable.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 02, 2010 6:17 pm Don't make bad jokes that you and I both know you don't mean.

[]: I'm wearing the cone of safety, I can speak my mind.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Oct 02, 2010 7:30 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Don't make bad jokes that you and I both know you don't mean.

Article: Interview with Kobun Shizuno about Evangelion 10
[]: Interview with Kobun Shizuno about Evangelion 1.0             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 02, 2010 4:39 pm Read here. It's been out for years now and I only just discovered it thanks to ReVa. Maybe I should reconsider which forum to call home if you guys don't keep up with this stuff! Of particular interest to me is that the dialogue for NME is recorded before the animation is animated. It'd be great if this caught on, as lip flap is generally anime's weakest point.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:19 pm SSD can't be blamed for "not keeping up" with something she wasn't aware of! Anyway, interesting stuff. I agree that it makes more sense to record the lines first then match the expressions accordingly instead of the reverse with standard anime practice. I'm also kind of glad to know that all Anno had to do was give the cast a call and they were fine with coming back, heh.
